name: Number C9: Chaos Dyson Sphere
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蓋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カオス・ダイソン・スフィア
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Kyū Tengaiyōsei Kaosu Daison Sufia
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 9: Spectral Canopy Star - Chaos Dyson Sphere
desc:
3 Level 10 monsters
At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can attach that monster to this card as a face-up Xyz Material. Once per turn: You can inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each Xyz Material attached to this card. If this card has "Number 9: Dyson Sphere" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn: You can detach any number of Xyz Materials from this card; inflict 800 damage to your opponent for each.
